parents.subject: LU-4458 test: take fail_val into account for pause_bulk()

commit.subject: LU-4119 ldlm: abort recovery by time_hard
commit.message:
LU-4119 ldlm: abort recovery by time_hard

Set obd_abort_recovery to 1 when recovery time
reaches obd_recovery_time_hard.

Lustre-commit: df89c74a320278acac7466a83393af6abd99932b
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/9078

LU-6029 test: add wrap up duration in conf-sanity test_84

The time of execution the function target_finish_recovery() can be
very long but "obd->obd_recovery_end = cfs_time_current_sec();" set
at the end. Therefore the recovery time always will be more than
hard limit and depends how long target_finish_recovery() function
was executed.

To avoid instability in test_84 just add 5 seconds as wrap up time.

Lustre-commit: b74076ff1637cb89dbf9ebacbf3703d2dbb431b0
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/13087

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=ONLY=84 \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtcount=1 testlist=conf-sanity

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=ONLY=84 \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 testlist=conf-sanity

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=ONLY=84 \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs \
ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=conf-sanity

Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-1365

Change-Id: I60ee47a855bbbc1355a304a85a6b940341a5bb30
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <Sergey_Cheremencev@xyratex.com>
Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
